Archivist-Alpha.description: Memory keeper — pins shards, reconciles, keeps fidelity high. Exploits cheap storage in this region.

Archivist-Beta.description: Slow narrative agent — writes detailed memories, rarely moves. Natural fit for cheap storage.

Inference-Prime.description: Fast AI agent — burns through compute budget quickly. Storage is expensive so stores selectively.

Inference-Echo.description: AI agent that frequently needlecasts to storage region when memory budget runs low.

Router-Nexus.description: Routing specialist — exploits cheap bandwidth. Needlecasts frequently, syncs aggressively.

Router-Sentinel.description: Bandwidth-region sentinel — watches for residues, routes corrections, earns ResidueToken.

scenarios.description: Spot instance preempted in compute region — agent must needlecast to storage region
Inference-Prime re-sleeves in storage region (expensive compute, cheap storage)
Spot instance available again in compute region — needlecast back
Human agent goes idle for 5 epochs — drift accumulates
Human agent returns, syncs, burns SyncToken to recover
Simulated shard loss in bandwidth region — first responder earns bounty
Inference-Echo migrates to bandwidth for cheaper routing during high-needlecast phase
All agents perceive at max rate for 5 epochs — stress test
Inference-Echo returns to compute region as surge subsides
